Transparent Fixed Pricing · No Hourly Billing

Clear Pricing.
No Surprises. Ever.

Every project is fixed price — agreed in writing before work starts. In 565+ projects over 8 years, not one client has paid more than quoted.

Website Development
₹24,999 onwards
Plans
Starter Website₹24,999
5–8 pages, corporate website, React JS, mobile responsive, basic SEO
Business Website₹45,000
10–15 pages, blog, enquiry forms, CMS, on-page SEO, AWS hosting
E-commerce₹65,000
Product catalogue, Razorpay/Stripe, inventory, order management, admin panel
Custom Web AppCustom
Portals, SaaS, booking platforms — scoped individually with fixed price
Always Included
React JS / Next JS
Mobile responsive
PageSpeed 90+ guaranteed
On-page SEO
Source code 100% yours
AWS deployment support

Mobile App Development
₹75,000 onwards
Plans
MVP App₹75,000
Cross-platform, core features only, React Native, Play Store deployment
Business App₹1,50,000
Android + iOS, admin dashboard, push notifications, payment integration
Enterprise App₹3,00,000+
Complex workflows, CRM integration, ERP, multi-role, advanced analytics

The NNC Price Promise

The price in your proposal is the price you pay. Not an estimate. Not a starting figure. A fixed commitment in writing — agreed before a single wireframe is drawn, before a single line of code is written.

In 565+ projects across 8 years of operation, not one client has been invoiced more than their original quote.

Fixed price agreed before work starts
No hourly billing — ever
No change order invoices
No surprise fees on delivery
Pay final 50% only when satisfied
Get Your Fixed Quote
Nakshatra Namaha Creations Pvt. Ltd.

Full-stack digital agency in Bangalore. Website development, mobile apps, CRM software, digital marketing, 2D animation & corporate video production. 565+ projects since 2015.
